sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP, numeric_value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, data, created_at, numeric_value) VALUES (1, 'demo1', NOW(), 1.2345);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, data, created_at, numeric_value) VALUES (2, 'demo2', NOW(), NULL);
SELECT id, sha1_digest(data) AS hashed_data FROM test_data WHERE data LIKE 'demo%';
SELECT id, sha1_digest(data) AS hashed_data FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE numeric_value IS NULL) AND data LIKE '%' || sha1_digest('demo') || '%';
SELECT t1.id, t1.data, sha1_digest(t2.data) AS linked_hash FROM test_data t1 JOIN test_data t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.data LIKE '%' || 'demo2' || '%';
SELECT id, sha1_digest(COALESCE(data, 'EMPTY')) FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING sha1_digest(data) LIKE 'WGPZ5MvfUi6qYuB0f86xxbJJuhM=';
SELECT AVG(numeric_value) AS avg_value, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT numeric_value FROM test_data WHERE numeric_value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery GROUP BY numeric_value HAVING avg_value > 0;
SELECT id, data, sha1_digest(CONCAT(data, CAST(numeric_value AS VARCHAR))) AS complex_hash FROM test_data WHERE data LIKE 'demo%' OR numeric_value IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, sha1_digest(data) AS temp_hash FROM test_data WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_test WHERE temp_hash LIKE 'Q%';
